query: SELECT j.id, j.title, j.status, j.postedBy, COUNT(a.id) as app_count FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN applications a ON a.jobId = j.id GROUP BY j.id, j.title, j.status, j.postedBy ORDER BY j.created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
